rag_rules: Fix type errors by ensuring all identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible and properly typed.
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' by tracing unresolved references on the same line.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts.
Ensure type consistency between declarations and expressions in AGREE.
Validate that AGREE scalar types match AADL expectations (int, real, bool).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must resolve to valid types; avoid <error> by checking visibility and declaration.
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Do not assume types without verifying their declaration or visibility.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE annex placement in component types vs implementations
Component type vs implementation scope rules
